topic: Myth: 'My customers are all word-of-mouth, I don't need a website'
caption:
Your best referral just Googled you. Did they find anything?

Word-of-mouth still ends online. Every time.

If there's no site, there's no proof you're legit.

We build websites for High Desert small businesses. Link in bio.

#HighDesert #Victorville #Hesperia #AppleValley #SmallBusiness #SmallBusinessOwner #WebDesign #WebsiteDesign #VeteranOwned #LocalSEO #ShopLocal #WordOfMouth #TrustSignals
alt_text: Bold text graphic showing the myth 'I don't need a website, I rely on word-of-mouth' crossed out, with the fact that referrals still search online before calling, branded with the BuildMyWebNow logo.

copy.myth: My customers are all word-of-mouth, I don't need a website
copy.fact: Word-of-mouth sends people online to verify you first
copy.body: Even a referral Googles you before they call. No site means no credibility, and that referral goes to a competitor who has one.
